allow: Bash(node -e "const mod = require\('pdf-parse'\); console.log\('Type:', typeof mod\); console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(mod\).slice\(0, 10\)\); console.log\('Default:', typeof mod.default\); console.log\('PDFParse:', typeof mod.PDFParse\);")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import pdfParse from 'pdf-parse'; console.log\('Type:', typeof pdfParse\); console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(pdfParse\).slice\(0, 5\)\);")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { PDFParse } from 'pdf-parse'; console.log\('Type:', typeof PDFParse\); console.log\('Is function:', typeof PDFParse === 'function'\);")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/pdf-parse'\); console.log\(typeof p, typeof p.default, Object.keys\(p\).slice\(0,5\)\)")
